nodes.label: OE Maskable App Icon (512px)
nodes.summary: 512x512 maskable PWA icon for the Open Energy Platform. Dark navy/steel-blue square background (#1e3a5f approx). Central graphic composed of three interlocking arcs/rings: a blue arc (top-left), a teal/green arc (top-right), and a white arc (bottom), arranged in a circular triquetra-like motif with a small circular eye-like focal point at the center where arcs intersect. No visible text. Maskable format indicates safe-zone cropping for Android adaptive icons.

nodes.label: Open Energy Platform Brand Identity
nodes.summary: Brand system for the Open Energy Platform (oe.vantax.co.za), South African energy exchange. Color palette: dark navy background, steel blue, teal/green, white.

nodes.label: PWA Maskable Icon Format
nodes.summary: Progressive Web App maskable icon specification — 512px square with safe zone padding so OS-level adaptive icon shapes (circle, squircle, etc.) can crop without clipping the brand mark.

nodes.label: Dark Navy Background (#1e3a5f approx)
nodes.summary: Primary background color used in the icon: deep navy blue, consistent with Open Energy Platform dark theme.

nodes.label: Steel Blue Arc
nodes.summary: The large arc in the upper-left of the icon logo mark, rendered in a medium steel/cornflower blue.

nodes.label: Teal/Green Arc
nodes.summary: The arc in the upper-right of the icon logo mark, rendered in teal/green — connotes renewable energy.

nodes.label: White Arc
nodes.summary: The arc at the bottom of the icon logo mark, rendered in white.

nodes.label: Three-Arc Interlocking Logo Mark
nodes.summary: Abstract logo mark composed of three curved arcs/rings (blue, teal, white) interlocking around a central focal dot — evokes energy cycles, circular economy, or the 'OE' initials abstracted into arcs.
